raw_text: 1 2026-07-07 IITGOA/DoRD/018/REC/2026 Click here for advertisement Research Associate-II 2026-07-14, 10:00 AM A walk-in interview will be conducted for the position of Research Associate–II under the project titled “Marine Species Identification and Recognition Using AI” at the School of Mathematics and Computer Science, IIT Goa. The project is sponsored by the Ministry of Earth Sciences. The selected research associate will be required to travel to CMLRE, Kochi, and NIOT, Chennai, and may also be required to participate in a scientific cruise expedition, if necessary. School of Mathematics and Computer Science Conduct cutting-edge research, develop and implement advanced AI models, lead interdisciplinary collaborations, mentor researchers, and publish findings. - Conduct cutting-edge research in ML/DL based computer vision focused on the marine environment - Develop, optimize, and implement AI models - Lead interdisciplinary collaborations - Manage data collection and analysis PI: Dr. Shitala Prasad Contact No: 0832-2490-105 Email id: shitala@iitgoa.ac.in

2 2026-07-07 IITGoa/DoRD/017/REC/2026 Click here for advertisement ANRF- Senior Research Fellow 2026-07-20, 10:00 AM A walk-in interview will be conducted for the position of ANRF- Senior Research Fellow under the project titled “ Computational investigation of gravity-driven cohesive granular flow in a silo” at the School of Mechanical Sciences, IIT Goa. The project is sponsored by the Anusandhan National Research Foundation. School of Mechanical Sciences This project work intends to utilize computations based on the discrete element method (DEM) to examine granular flow in a silo. PI: Dr. Ashish Bhateja, Associate Professor, School of Mechanical Sciences. Contact No: 0832-2490-129 Email id: ashish@iitgoa.ac.in
